articles.title: ETH Drops to 2-Year Lows Amid Crypto Selloff
articles.description: Ethereum prices dropped to a 2-year low of $1,415 on Monday.

articles.title: Ethereum Whales Scoop Up $60M as ETH Price Tumbles to 2023 Lows
articles.description: Ethereum whales went bargain hunting, buying up $60M worth of ETH as prices crashed to 2023 levels in a show of long-term confidence.

articles.title: Former Binance CEO CZ joins Pakistan Crypto Council as advisor
articles.description: Zhao's appointment to the Pakistan Crypto Council comes amid the country's larger effort to bolster its blockchain industry and attract international investment.

articles.title: Markets are crashing. Bitcoin at 75k
articles.description: Global markets and cryptocurrencies tumbled as Trump’s tariff escalation sparked fears of a global recession and mass investor sell-offs.
